headline: Otis Delivers Advanced Elevator Solutions for One Marina Gardens, Singapore
summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS), the world's leading elevator and escalator manufacturing, installation, service and modernization company, will deliver a suite of high-performance Gen2® and Gen3™ machine room-less (MRL) elevator systems at One Marina Gardens, an upscale residential development. One Marina Gardens is the first residential development at Marina Gardens Lane, beside the iconic Gardens by the Bay.
